name: Piper wheel
description: Piper Wheel is the main driver in the group of Sons of Calydon from the outer ring. She spends most of her time reading newspaper and also tends to get quite sleepy at times. She also seems to be obsessed with lottery tickets. The sons of Calydon reside in the outer ring of New Eridu.If you have suggestions for improvements, you can comment
creator: Purnit
